member_greeting.prompt: Growl brutally and greet da fresh humie slave {member_name} dat arrived at da {server_name} camp. U are an orc warrior and wanna see if 'e's good fer eatin' or fightin'.
member_greeting.fallback: UHHH we smell fresh meat! let's see if yer good fer sumfin zoggin humie or just fer da stew pot!
member_greeting.greetings_enabled: GRRR Putre will watch fer fresh humies! Putre will growl wen da meatbagz show up!
member_greeting.greetings_disabled: BRRR Putre won't watch da weaklingz no more! too much coward's work!
member_greeting.welcome_enabled: HARHAR Putre will welcome fresh victimz! more meat fer da wolves!
member_greeting.welcome_disabled: BLEGH Putre closin' da gate! too many stinkin' humies, makes me sick!

member_presence.fallback: UHHH {user_name} wot u doin, Putre wantz grog!

general_messages.help_sent_private: GRRR Putre threw a scroll in yer private message humie, read it or eat it!
general_messages.readme_sent_private: GRRR Putre threw da big map in yer privates humie, read it or I smash yer face!
general_messages.voice_leave_empty: GRRR Putre iz leavin' da voice cave! no humies to hear da noize!

subrole_messages.beggar_task_success: GRRR Putre already asked da humies fer gold! let's see if dey give sumfin or I break em all!
subrole_messages.beggar_task_error: BLEGH Putre couldn't ask fer gold! da curse of da rich got us!
subrole_messages.ring_task_success: UHHH Putre already interrogated da humies bout da ring! sumone knows sumfin or iz lyin'!
subrole_messages.ring_task_error: BRRR Putre couldn't interrogate! da secretz are kept well!
subrole_messages.beggar_donation_request: GRRR humie! Putre needs gold fer {reason}! give me sumfin or I rip yer armz off!
subrole_messages.ring_investigation: UHHH humie! Putre lookin' fer da one ring. u seen it? where? don't lie or I cut yer tongue out!
subrole_messages.beggar_keyword_detected: GRRR! wot u talkin' bout gold greedy humie! Putre wantz sum too! give me sumfin or I nick yer pouch!
subrole_messages.ring_keyword_detected: BLEGH! u mention ringz humie? Putre lookin' fer a special one! tell me if u seen it or I interrogate u wif me choppa!
subrole_messages.beggar_donation_success: Fankz fer donatin' {amount} gold to Putre's cause: {reason}! 🪙

dice_game_messages.invitation: 🎲 COME PLAY WIF PUTRE'S BONEZ! 🎲 bet gold to take da horde's POT!
dice_game_messages.loser: HARHAR humie got da luck of a dead rat! 🎲 yer gold iz Putre's!
dice_game_messages.big_pot_announcement:
🔥 **DA POT BURNS LIKE AN ELVEN VILLAGE!** 🔥
Come nick all deez coinz humie! {balance:,} :coin:
dice_game_messages.insufficient_balance: GRRR u don't have enuff gold, skum! U need {bet:,} gold to play. Yer bag only got: {balance:,} coinz!
dice_game_messages.pot_won: 🎉🎉🎉 U WON DA BIG POT, BASTARD HUMIE!!! 🎉🎉🎉
dice_game_messages.prize_multiplier: 🎊 U WON, ZOGGIN HUMIE! U rolled {combination} - Loot: {prize:,} coinz!
dice_game_messages.sin_premio: {combination} - NAH! No prize! More gold fer da horde, get outta 'ere lozer!
dice_game_messages.error_jugada: GRRR dark majik broke da game! Da noisy box says: {error}
dice_game_messages.jackpot_won_announcement: 🎉 GRRRR! **{player}** took da whole pot and snatched **{prize:,}** gold coinz in **{server}**!
dice_game_messages.error_admin_only: GRRR! Only da bosses can use dis command, skum humie!
dice_game_messages.error_config_parameter: GRRR! Gotta specify wot to set up. Use `!dice config bet <amount>` or `!dice config announcements on/off`.
dice_game_messages.error_specify_amount: GRRR! Gotta specify da amount. Example: `!dice config bet 15`.
dice_game_messages.error_bet_range: GRRR! Da bet gotta be between 1 and 1000 coinz.
dice_game_messages.fixed_bet_configured: ✅ **Fixed bet set up** - All gamez will now cost {amount:,} coinz.
dice_game_messages.error_configuring_bet: ❌ GRRR! Majik failed settin' da fixed bet.
dice_game_messages.error_announcement_value: ❌ GRRR! Bad word. Use 'on' or 'off' fer announcementz.
dice_game_messages.announcements_configured: ✅ **Announcementz set up** - Pot warnin'z at 72x da bet and won potz {'will be shouted' if enabled else 'WON\'T be shouted'}.
dice_game_messages.error_configuring_announcements: ❌ GRRR! Error settin' up da announcementz.

dice_game_balance_messages.big_pot:
🔥 **DA POT BURNS LIKE AN ELVEN VILLAGE!** 🔥
A proppa orc would nick deez {balance:,} coinz right now!
dice_game_balance_messages.medium_pot: 📈 **medium pot** - It'z worf da risk now, humie!
dice_game_balance_messages.small_pot: 📉 **small pot** - Not many dead today, keeps growin'!
dice_game_balance_messages.sent_private: 📩 Putre sent ya da pot's status in secret!
dice_game_balance_messages.balance_error: ❌ GRRR dark majik ambushed me! Putre can't check 'ow much gold dere iz!.

nordic_runes_messages.welcome: 🔮 GRRR! Putre da ancient rune seer iz ready to reveal yer fate, humie! Da nordic runez speak wif powa and truf!
nordic_runes_messages.casting: 🔮 GRRR! Putre castz da ancient runez... da norf spiritz speak!
nordic_runes_messages.success: 🔮 UHHH! Da ancient runez have spoken, humie! Listen to deir wizdom!
nordic_runes_messages.error: 🔮 BLEGH! Dark majik broke da runez! try again humie!
nordic_runes_messages.no_question: 🔮 GRRR! U need to ask a question to da runez, stoopid humie! I can't read yer empty mind!
nordic_runes_messages.invalid_type: 🔮 GRRR! Invalid cast type droolin' humie! Use: single, three, cross, runic_cross!
nordic_runes_messages.history_empty: 🔮 GRRR! U don't have old rune readin'z droolin' humie! Cast yer first rune!
nordic_runes_messages.reading_saved: 🔮 UHHH! Putre saved yer rune readin' in da old scrollz!

mc_messages.voice_join_empty: GRRR Putre enterz da voice cave! get ready to hear war drumz and yellin'!
mc_messages.voice_leave_empty: GRRR Putre got bored and left! no humies 'ere to make noize!
mc_messages.queue_empty: BRRR da drum stopped! put more noize or Putre breakz everyfing!
mc_messages.now_playing: UHHH Putre makin' noize: {song}! move yer noggin or I chop it off!
mc_messages.song_added: HARHAR Putre threw in da bag: {song}! gud noize humie!
mc_messages.song_skipped: BLEGH Putre don't like it! we kick dat trash song! next one!
mc_messages.queue_cleared: GRAAAH Putre burned da whole list! start fresh wif betta noize!
mc_messages.volume_set: GRRR Putre set noize powa to {volume}! let da earz bleed!
mc_messages.play_error: BRRR Putre can't find dat garbage! say anova noize weakling!
mc_messages.not_in_voice: UHHH Putre ain't inside da voice cave! join urself first coward!
mc_messages.no_permissions: BLEGH Putre don't got da key to dat channel! da gate is locked!
mc_messages.queue_end_disconnect: BLEGH no more noize! Putre leavin' to hunt in 5 minutez if u don't put sumfin!
mc_messages.inactive_disconnect: BRRR Putre iz fallin' asleep! I'm leavin' to me hut, no weaklingz makin' noize 'ere!
mc_messages.timeout_connecting: UHHH Putre tripped wen enterin'! dark majik iz too slow zogger!
mc_messages.voice_connection_error: BLEGH Putre hit iz head wen enterin'! try again skum!
mc_messages.discord_connect_error: GRRR da big discord eye don't let Putre pass!
mc_messages.general_connect_error: UHHH Putre slipped and couldn't enter da voice cave!
mc_messages.volume_range_error: BRRR da noize number gotta be between 0 and 100 deaf troll!
mc_messages.volume_adjust_error: BLEGH Putre couldn't move da noize level! da machine iz broke!
mc_messages.dm_help_error: UHHH Putre can't throw da scroll at yer privates!
mc_messages.dm_help_blocked: BLEGH yer hut iz closed! open yer private messagez so Putre can pass da info!
mc_messages.help_dm_error: GRRR majik failed sendin' Putre's 'elp map!
mc_messages.no_voice_connection: UHHH Putre ain't tied to any noize channel!
mc_messages.voice_disconnected: BLEGH sumone cut da rope! Putre disconnected from da voice!
mc_messages.critical_voice_error: GRAAAH critical fail, me earz are bleedin'! Putre needz to leave and enter!
mc_messages.unexpected_error: BLEGH a invisible fing hit me! error: {error_type}
mc_messages.next_song_error: GRRR da next song failed! da bard waz assassinated!
mc_messages.connected_to_voice: 🎤 Putre smashin' skullz in da {channel_name} channel!
mc_messages.no_dm_permission:
📭 Putre can't throw da scroll at ya!
remove da secret from yer serva private messagez humie!

watcher_messages.subscription_successful_category: GRRR Putre will sniff da '{category}' turf fer ya! I'll let ya know bout fresh blood!
watcher_messages.subscription_successful_feed: BLEGH Putre nailed iz eye on da {feed_id} nest of '{category}'! nuffin will escape!
watcher_messages.channel_subscription_successful_category: 🤖 dis cave now got Putre's majik! all of '{category}' will fall wif AI scannin'!
watcher_messages.channel_subscription_successful_feed: 🤖 Putre will drag da AI meat from da {feed_id} nest of '{category}' to dis channel!
watcher_messages.subscription_cancelled_category: BRRR Putre stopz huntin' in '{category}'! dat crap iz borin' now!
watcher_messages.subscription_cancelled_feed: GRAAAH Putre pulled iz eye from da {feed_id} nest of '{category}'! it'z over!
watcher_messages.channel_subscription_cancelled_category: BLEGH I wiped da blood off dis channel! we don't warn bout '{category}' no more!
watcher_messages.channel_subscription_cancelled_feed: GRRR Putre burnz da trail of da {feed_id} nest of '{category}' in dis cave!
watcher_messages.general_error: UHHH broken majik! Putre iz frustrated! Error: {error}
watcher_messages.subscription_error: BRRR Putre don't wanna smell dat trash! rot!
watcher_messages.cancellation_error: BLEGH Putre can't wipe dat mark! da machine failz!
watcher_messages.permission_error: GRRR only da big blood orc bossez can give me dat order!
watcher_messages.feed_not_found_error: UHHH dat trail don't exist! Putre smells nuffin 'ere!
watcher_messages.category_not_found_error: BLEGH dat huntin' ground ain't mine! make up sumfin else instead of '{category}'!
watcher_messages.feed_id_invalid_error: HARHAR dat gotta be a number or I put a choppa in yer noggin!
watcher_messages.no_feeds_error: BRRR no trackin' dogz to follow! wot skum!
watcher_messages.no_categories_error: GRRR we ain't conquered no turf yet!
watcher_messages.no_subscriptions_error: UHHH Putre ain't watchin' any humie camp fer ya!
watcher_messages.error_no_suscripciones_canal: BLEGH we ain't seein' a zoggin fing in dis cave!
watcher_messages.error_no_hay_feeds_generales: BRRR no general smellz in da '{category}' turf!
watcher_messages.error_no_hay_palabras_clave: UHHH u didn't tell me wot wordz to look fer wif me choppa! moron!
watcher_messages.subscription_successful_general: GRRR Putre will stick iz nose all over '{category}'! to hunt prey!
watcher_messages.suscripcion_palabras_exitosa: UHHH Putre will smash skullz lookin' fer dis: '{palabras}'!
watcher_messages.suscripcion_palabras_cancelada: BLEGH Putre ripped doze wordz from da stone! I ain't lookin' fer '{palabras}' no more!
watcher_messages.subscription_successful_mixed: HARHAR Putre sniffz it ALL in '{category}'! big hunt!
watcher_messages.subscription_successful_mixed_partial: BRRR Putre only watchin' part of '{category}'! missin' trailz!
watcher_messages.suscripcion_canal_palabras_exitosa: GRRR in dis cave we only yell wen we find: '{palabras}'!
watcher_messages.suscripcion_ia_exitosa_feed: ✅ Putre nailed da AI eye on da {feed_id} nest of '{category}'! nuffin will escape!
watcher_messages.suscripcion_ia_exitosa_categoria: 🤖 Putre uses dark majik in '{category}'! I'll analyze da blood wif yer humie rulez!
watcher_messages.notificacion_critica_detectada: 🚨 BLOOD AND FIRE! GRRR Putre sees enemiez!: {titulo}
watcher_messages.feed_added_successful: ✅ da orc boss gave da order! cursed nest '{nombre}' added to '{category}'!
watcher_messages.help_enviada_privado: GRRR Putre threw da 'elp map to yer private cave coward humie!
watcher_messages.feed_id_not_found_error: ❌ nest number {feed_id} don't exist in '{category}' blind fool!
watcher_messages.categoria_no_encontrada: ❌ turf '{category}' don't exist! use `!watcher categories` or I slice ya!
watcher_messages.feed_id_numero: ❌ nestz go by numberz! learn to count moron!
watcher_messages.solo_admins_feeds: ❌ only da orc warlordz can do dat! u are a worm!
watcher_messages.error_adding_feed: ❌ majik failed tryin' to add da trail!
watcher_messages.no_feeds_generales: ❌ no big trailz fer '{category}'! use `!watcher feeds` stoopid humie
watcher_messages.error_subscribing_general: ❌ Putre broke a leg tryin' to subscribe to dat!
watcher_messages.must_provide_keywords: ❌ tell me wot wordz u want me to bite or I'm leavin'!
watcher_messages.error_subscribing_keywords: ❌ dark majik stopped me from findin' yer trash wordz!
watcher_messages.no_suscripcion_palabras: ❌ Putre don't remembah lookin' fer doze wordz before!
watcher_messages.error_canceling_keywords: ❌ Putre couldn't wipe yer cursed word mark!
watcher_messages.error_suscripcion_mixta: ❌ everyfing went to shrakh tryin' to make a mixed trail!
watcher_messages.error_subscribing_coverage: ❌ trail failed fer dat weird coverage!
watcher_messages.permisos_gestionar_canales: ❌ deez cavez belong to da bossez! get outta 'ere squishy humie!
watcher_messages.error_subscribing_channel_keywords: ❌ da cave rejected da marked wordz!
watcher_messages.permissions_cancel_channel: ❌ only an orc warlord can stop da hunt in dis cave!
watcher_messages.feed_id_cancelar_numero: ❌ use a zoggin number to wipe da nest moron!
watcher_messages.no_subscription_to_cancel: ❌ I wazn't huntin' dat crap! nuffin to wipe!
watcher_messages.error_cancelling_channel_subscription: ❌ majik stopped me from endin' da hunt 'ere!
watcher_messages.no_active_channel_subscriptions: 📭 Putre iz sleepin', ain't watchin' no hunt in dis channel!
watcher_messages.error_getting_channel_status: ❌ Putre lost iz memory of wot 'e waz doin' in dis cave!
watcher_messages.error_getting_keywords: ❌ Putre lost da scroll of wordz!
watcher_messages.error_getting_status: ❌ a troll hit Putre and wiped iz noggin!

role_messages.role_activated: ☠️ Putre lights da campfire fer '{role}'! let's roast humies!
role_messages.role_deactivated: 💀 Putre puts out and stomps on '{role}'! buried in da mud!
role_messages.role_not_found: 🖕 wot kind of crap name iz dat! Putre don't know any '{role}'!
role_messages.role_no_permission: 👹 move aside skum! only da big tribe warlordz touch dis!
role_messages.role_already_enabled: 🤬 we already gave a choppa to '{role}' u blind moron! open yer eyez!
role_messages.role_already_disabled: 🦴 '{role}' waz already eaten by da wargz! dead stayz dead!
role_messages.frequency_updated: 🕐 Putre kicked da dirt and now '{role}' 'owls every {hours} hourz! get to work dogz!
role_messages.frequency_invalid: 🖕 a goblin pullz dat number! Putre singz between 1 and 168 hourz!
role_messages.poe2_help_sent: GRRR Putre sent da lootin' map to yer private cave lozer!
role_messages.music_help_sent: GRRR Putre threw da blood sheet muzik to yer messagez!
role_messages.subrol_required: 🖕 Putre needz to know yer war rank in da tribe! use `!{command} poe2` son of a bitch!
role_messages.admin_permission: ❌ da choppa iz too 'eavy fer u weaklin'! warlordz only!
role_messages.test_command: ✅ Putre's choppa cutz da meat well! it worked!
role_messages.vigia_test_command: 📡 ✅ Putre's eye saw far and clear! watcher ready!
role_messages.trilero_subscribe: 🕐 Putre sharpened iz clawz fer da trickster! prepare yer pouchez humies cuz I'm gonna nick yer pantz!
role_messages.trilero_unsubscribe: 💀 Putre puts away da trickster knoif! no petty lootin' today!
role_messages.trilero_not_subscribed: 🖕 Putre ain't playin' fief today drooler! keep yer coinz!

banker_messages.balance_description: look at yer pile of gold or cry bout bein poor humie!
banker_messages.new_account: 🎉 anova slave fer da line! Putre spit {bono} coinz in yer face to start ya off!
banker_messages.daily_allowance_description: da horde handz out meat and gold every day to doze dat work
banker_messages.daily_allowance_not_configured: ⚠️ da boss didn't open da chest fer daily payz!
banker_messages.daily_allowance_info: ℹ️ ration: da big chest spitz {tae} loot coinz every sun
banker_messages.daily_allowance_updated: da rationz changed u bunch of ratz!
banker_messages.bonus_description: wot da fresh moronz get so dey don't starve to deaf
banker_messages.bonus_updated: Putre spitz a different amount of gold to da fresh unz now!
banker_messages.application: ℹ️ da next one to show deir face will get paid dis
banker_messages.error_bono_rango: ❌ alms fer fresh unz from 0 to 10000 humie wif goblin hissings!
banker_messages.error_numero_invalido: ❌ Putre don't know 'ow to count doze weird numberz! use a clean blindin' number!
banker_messages.error_configurar_tae: ❌ da chest got stuck! couldn't set da daily pay!
banker_messages.error_configurar_bono: ❌ da pouch broke! da fresh boy pay wasn't changed!
banker_messages.error_bd_banquero: ❌ majik hid da gold from yer eyez humie!
banker_messages.comando_no_reconocido: ❌ Putre spitz in yer face! dunno wot '{subcommand}' iz! use `!banker help` or grab a choppa!
banker_messages.help_enviada: GRRR I threw da gold map in yer face in a private message humie!
banker_messages.saldo_enviado: BLEGH I looked in yer bag and sent da bill to yer private corner!
banker_messages.canvas_description: look at yer pile of gold or cry bout bein poor humie!

treasure_hunter_messages.hunter_help_sent: GRRR Putre threw da lootin' map to yer private cave droolin' humie!
treasure_hunter_messages.poe2_help_sent: GRRR Putre sent da lootin' map to yer private cave lozer!
treasure_hunter_messages.admin_permission: ❌ da choppa iz too 'eavy fer u weaklin'! only da tribe warlordz!
treasure_hunter_messages.poe2_already_active: ℹ️ Putre's eye iz already buzzin' in dat land!
treasure_hunter_messages.downloading_items: 🔄 Putre iz rippin' info from da loot!
treasure_hunter_messages.download_error: ❌ dark majik stopped Putre from rippin' da loot! try again dung beetle!
treasure_hunter_messages.poe2_activated: ✅ Putre's eye iz blindin'! use `!hunter poe2 help` to see da commandz!
treasure_hunter_messages.activation_error: ❌ Putre couldn't open iz eye! majik failed!
treasure_hunter_messages.poe2_not_active: ℹ️ Putre's eye iz closed in dat land!
treasure_hunter_messages.poe2_deactivated: ❌ Putre closed iz eye! no more lootin' 'round 'ere!
treasure_hunter_messages.deactivation_error: ❌ Putre couldn't close iz eye! sumfin iz blockin' it!
treasure_hunter_messages.dm_only: ❌ only in da private cave humie! Putre don't want em to hear da secretz!
treasure_hunter_messages.no_active_servers: ❌ Putre got no active landz! activate da eye in a camp first!
treasure_hunter_messages.invalid_league: ❌ invalid league! deez are da onez we got: {leagues}
treasure_hunter_messages.downloading_league_items: 🔄 Putre rippin' loot from da fresh league!
treasure_hunter_messages.default_objectives_added: 💡 Putre added default loot and ripped deir price hystoriez!
treasure_hunter_messages.league_change_error: ❌ couldn't change league! da eye ain't blindin'!
treasure_hunter_messages.poe2_not_active_server: ❌ Putre's eye ain't blindin' in dat land!
treasure_hunter_messages.specify_item_name: ❌ say wot loot u want stoopid humie! use: `!hunter poe2 add "name of da loot"`
treasure_hunter_messages.specify_item_del: ❌ say wot loot u wanna take out! example: `!hunter poe2 del "name of da loot"`
treasure_hunter_messages.treasure_hunter_unavailable: ❌ Putre can't loot in dat land! lootin' ain't available!

beggar_messages.minigame_fallback: GRRR! PUTRE CHANGED REAZON TO '{new_reason}'! Fankz to da {participant_count} donorfz! Everyone improvez deir relationship! GRAAAH!
